extensionDescription.message: Instant Core Web Vitals, plain-English fixes, and shareable reports for every page you visit.

subheadCurrentMobile.message: Performance for this page · Mobile emulation

titleHistoryBtn.message: View past runs for this origin

titleExportBtn.message: Download JSON and CSV of the current report

ariaLabelBackToCurrent.message: Back to performance for this page

stateNoDataLine2.message: Navigate to a web page and reopen.

stateErrorLine1.message: Couldn't load timings for this tab.

stateUnsupported.message: PulseVitals can't read this page type.

stateDenied.message: This origin is on your denylist. Update it in Options.

stateNoHistoryLine1.message: No past runs yet for this origin.

stateNoHistoryLine2.message: Reload the page and come back.

thirdPartyEmpty.message: No third-party resources detected on this page.

seoUnavailable.message: SEO signals unavailable for this page.

insightsEmptyPassing.message: No actionable issues detected. Core Web Vitals are passing — keep it up.

insightsEmptyMeasuring.message: Interact with the page (scroll, click) to populate CLS and INP. LCP usually arrives in the first second.

whatsnewBody.message: Third-party breakdown, SEO checks, platform-aware tips, RUM histogram, budgets, and a shareable HTML export. Full list in CHANGELOG.

consentLead.message: Before we start measuring, here's what PulseVitals does with your data:

consentPoint1.message: Measures only the active tab's performance data.

consentPoint2.message: Stores recent-run history on your device in browser storage.

consentPoint3.message: Never sends data to any server. No telemetry.

consentPoint4.message: You can clear history anytime from Options.

onboardingPoint1.message: Glance at the icon — color tells you if this page passes Core Web Vitals.

onboardingPoint2.message: Open the popup for plain-English fixes and a third-party breakdown.

onboardingPoint3.message: Hit Share to send a one-file report to a teammate or client.

insightSlowLcpFix.message: Optimize the LCP element — usually the hero image or above-the-fold text. Preload it, compress images to WebP or AVIF, and reduce CSS or JS blocking before the first paint.

insightLargeImageFix.message: Compress $FILENAME$ to WebP or AVIF and serve a responsive srcset. Target under 200 KB above the fold.

insightPoorClsFix.message: Reserve vertical space for late-loading content (ads, banners, iframes) with min-height or aspect-ratio. Avoid inserting content above existing content after load.

insightPoorInpFix.message: Break up long event handlers with requestIdleCallback or setTimeout(..., 0). Defer analytics and tag-manager scripts with async or defer.

insightSlowTtfbFix.message: Cache HTML at a CDN edge, move expensive work out of the request path, or upgrade hosting. Target TTFB under 300 ms.

insightLargeJsFix.message: Code-split with dynamic import(), remove unused libraries, and tree-shake. Ship modern ES for evergreen browsers.

insightLargeTotalFix.message: Audit third-party tags and remove unused resources. Compress text assets with Brotli. Lazy-load below-the-fold images.

insightSlowDomFix.message: Defer non-critical scripts, inline critical CSS, and reduce synchronous JavaScript that blocks parsing.

consoleErrorsEmpty.message: No JS errors captured during this page view.

diffNoChanges.message: No measurable differences between these two snapshots.

annoPlaceholder.message: Add a note for this snapshot…

insightImagesNonModernFix.message: Convert JPEG / PNG hero images to WebP or AVIF. Modern formats typically cut 30–60% off transfer size.

insightImagesMissingLazyTitle.message: $COUNT$ image(s) below the fold missing loading="lazy"

insightImagesMissingLazyFix.message: Add loading="lazy" to off-screen images so the browser defers them until needed.

insightImagesMissingSrcsetTitle.message: Hero image has no responsive srcset

insightImagesMissingSrcsetFix.message: Serve smaller variants via srcset + sizes so mobile users don't download the desktop hero.
